version_notes: v1.0.0 is the job-hunter family search member, carved from the v5.2.0 monolith's Phase 2 (4-tier search) + Phase 2.5 (deterministic scoring). Owns build_search_queries / expand_role_synonyms / normalize_salary / dedupe_postings (eval-only, no unit tests) + score_posting (3 load-bearing semantic tests). Reads .job-hunter-profile.md for match scoring if present; degrades to explicit user criteria. Produces scored postings.json per the family workspace-contract.
